title: Fixam Career Paths
subtitle: Find the perfect career path to build your skills and get booked by clients on Fixam.

faq.a1: Fixam Career Paths are self-paced, hands-on programs structured to help you master specific local trade skills. Each path includes practical exercises, standard model answers, and guidance designed by industry experts in Cameroon.
a1Bullets: Self-paced — learn on your own schedule
Earn a shareable certificate for your Fixam profile
No prior experience or qualifications needed
faq.a2: Quick Skills are short, bite-sized lessons under 15 minutes. They focus on specific techniques — like sanitizing a beauty station or grounding a circuit — to quickly expand your professional toolkit.
a2Bullets: Directly applicable tips for client jobs
Perfect for refreshing your knowledge on the go
